CREATE TABLE other_data (id INTEGER, values ARRAY<INTEGER>);
INSERT INTO other_data VALUES (1, ARRAY[ARRAY[5, 6], ARRAY[7, 8]]);
CREATE TABLE combined_data (lists1 ARRAY<INTEGER>, lists2 ARRAY<INTEGER>);
SELECT flatten(lists1) || flatten(lists2) AS combined FROM combined_data;
INSERT INTO complex_data VALUES (ARRAY[ARRAY[1, 2], ARRAY[3, 4], ARRAY[5, 6]]);
CREATE TABLE complex_lists (id INTEGER, lists ARRAY<ARRAY<INTEGER>>);
INSERT INTO complex_lists VALUES (1, ARRAY[ARRAY[1, 2], ARRAY[3]], ARRAY[ARRAY[4, 5]]);
SELECT id, flatten(lists) FROM complex_lists WHERE id = 1;
